meaning: adj.澶氬畼鑳界殑,澶氭満鑳界殑 澶氶噸鎬х殑
examples: Collagen is one of the important and polyfunctional protein from pig skin.
The temperature field and velocity field in a polyfunctional hall with floor air supply was measured.
Objective: To extract keratin of donkey skin for the preparation of colla corii Asini by polyfunctional extraction apparatus.
